title: BDRY - August 15, 2023
summary: Panamax spot rates shine as grain and mineral demand increases - The past few weeks have been quite positive China's economic woes continue as another property developer risks default - Almost two years after Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions
